title: sarcostemma odoratum
intro: Sarcostemma odoratum, commonly known as the "hanging vine" or "starfish vine," is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits associated with Sarcostemma odoratum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and aid in the management of diabetes and other metabolic disorders. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and powders that can be consumed as a tea or added to other medicinal formulations.
